heading: Today
text: Areas of fog lifting to some early sun. Becoming cloudy, with rain developing midday in NY south of the Adirondacks, a few showers north, spreading east this afternoon, mostly Rt. 2 and south.  Highs 70 to 75.  Winds light, becoming south near 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Rain from the southern Adirondacks and Rt. 2 south, a chance of showers north, tapering off west to east after midnight.  Lows ranging through the 50s.  Winds becoming light and variable.

heading: Tuesday
text: Morning clouds, any showers east, mostly in NH ending.  Increasing periods of sunshine west to east.  A slight chance of an afternoon shower north.  Highs ranging through the 70s.  Winds light, becoming northwest near 10 mph.
